name: contentforge
description: Open-source enterprise content production pipeline — 19 skills, 13 specialist agents, 11 quality gates, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, fact-checker subagent, three-category internal linking (topical / commercial / authority), real .docx output with embedded SEO + Quality + Production + Internal-Link appendices. **EU AI Act Article 50 ready** — C2PA content provenance signing for the .docx output (applicable 2 Aug 2026) via --c2pa-sign on scripts/generate-docx.py with .docx-embed-if-supported + verifiable .c2pa.json sidecar fallback. **Installs on Claude Code (CLI + IDE extensions) and Anthropic Cowork.** v3.12.11 (2026-05-26): honest positioning. Removed the v3.11 / v3.12 era invented manifests for OpenAI Codex / Cursor / GitHub Copilot CLI / Google Antigravity 2.0 — research confirmed those manifests did not match the platforms' actual install specs and would have failed real install attempts. Real multi-platform support is on the roadmap (research saved at memory/{antigravity,codex}-plugin-spec-may-2026.md). v3.12.10 closed three Cowork-with-Drive roadmap items (cross-session checkpoint resume, brand-profile read-back from Drive, multi-team namespace isolation). v3.12.3 fixed two production bugs: (1) dual-copy save — finished .docx now also written to user-visible ~/Documents/ContentForge/<brand>/<type>/<YYYY-MM>/ alongside the internal tracking copy; (2) per-phase checkpointing via scripts/checkpoint-manager.py + /contentforge:resume command — interrupted pipeline runs resume from the last completed phase instead of restarting from Phase 1. /contentforge:output-folder reveals the visible output folder in the OS file manager. v3.10.0 added C2PA .docx signing. v3.9 humanizer with 29-pattern AI-detection catalog. Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs (16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors catalogued in .mcp.json.connectors-reference). MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside Digital Marketing Pro and SocialForge. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): aliases like latest-balanced-anthropic / latest-vision-google resolve to concrete ids at call time; deprecated ids auto-fall-forward. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
